title: Ocugen Provides Business Update with Q3 2025 Financial Results
text: Ocugen provided business update with third quarter 2025 financial results. Q3 2025 operating expenses continued through ongoing clinical programs. OCU400 Phase 3 liMeliGhT trial progressing with enrollment completed. OCU410 ArMaDa Phase 1/2 trial advancing with Phase 2 expansion ongoing. OCU410ST GARDian Phase 1/2 trial nearing completion of Phase 1 dosing. Company maintaining focus on advancing three modifier gene therapy programs targeting retinal blindness diseases. Multiple clinical data announcements planned for late 2025 and 2026. Cash runway extended through recent financing efforts. Company progressing toward major regulatory milestones including BLA submissions for OCU400 in 2026 with potential approvals by 2028.
